name: TSA Inspection on Goth
description:
“Private inspections sounds worse. Public feels worse. I’m really spoiled for options.”

Premise:

At airport security, goth tattoo artist Raven becomes the unintended spectacle when her piercings set off every alarm in sight. The line watches. The machine keeps beeping. Now, faced with two humiliating options—a public pat-down under fluorescent lights or a private inspection behind closed doors—Raven has to choose how much control she’s willing to give up.
